{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322021626900FE953BA19421A1FF7"}"},"total":108},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7513740657909203736","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还蛮有趣的，刚开始文笔很小白，像小孩子之间的对话（不是指动漫剧情，仅指文笔），但进步显而易见，越往后看文笔越好，作者大大棒棒哒～有好几个我喜欢的世界，我有很认真的看，真的不错，很有趣[偷笑]剧情多，感情线相对来说比较少，不过每个世界都不长，就也还好，反正我觉得挺好看的[害羞][害羞][害羞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749436130,"group_id":"7441020513469598744","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"吾日三省吾身，吾无错～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7dg1RsoMWfSnkoaGLzSxA+f5zZG3lXDJspB9V1SY9XD","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f4df213641ed4368bf8a0ab06798fa0b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704288&x-signature=eSkvUJx1KfVjw7hIwUr5OAE%2FRSo%3D","user_id":"1428992722734588","user_name":"那抹心上的月光呀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1428992722734588","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7441020513469598744","book_info":{"abstract":"［综漫+不是很快的快穿+双男主+主受+主神攻］
殷离在某一天加班猝死后，被自称A116的系统选中，帮助它完成任务。
一个个缤纷的世界，一群群有趣的人。
而焕然新生的灵魂又将何去何从。
万幸总有一个人始终相伴。
——————
越前龙马：为什么打网球？突然发现每天都在打，即使我想停也停不下来了。
月咏几斗：今天对于我来说也是特别的。
奴良陆生：近来我总在做梦，那桃花树下美丽的身影。
鲁路修：成为我的枷锁吧。
——————
观前提醒：【1.文笔差，文风小白，自娱自乐文，文章很无聊，内含大量原创角色，不喜勿入。】
【2.非爽文，即使经过了几个世界后主角也依旧是会害怕会胆怯的正常人。】
【3.感情戏很烂。】
【4.逻辑无能，ooc预警。】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/09b9dfb073e3491dde1b618e1d6c4654~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"清月出岭","author_id":"","book_id":"7441020513469598744","book_name":"综漫：男主总是不对劲","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8c0b0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4965人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7441021387155702296","read_count":"4965","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1054689"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"371","tags":"双男主,系统,二次元,综漫,同人,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/29f35db3abe78771d8c3f495f1e226f6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779300986&x-signature=haqEulR3PGlUWF38wVjh%2FpkEFLM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1895987574222408","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"90"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322021626900FE953BA19421A1FF7"}"},"relate_info_l
